phases.title: Mobile Data Layer: Capture, Parse, Persist, Dedup
phases.notes: Shares mobile/package.json and mobile/tsconfig.json with Phase 3 — Phase 3 edits MUST be append-only (preserve Phase-2 scripts/jest block/deps); a Phase-3 gate asserts they survive.

phases.title: Mobile UI: Navigation, Inbox, Full-Message View, Capture Wiring
phases.notes: registerForPush.ts is owned here for the additive allowBadge permission options (3.6a); token-minting logic stays functional. Requires a fresh Expo dev build after native deps; automated gates are JS-only.

requirements.statement: _build_push_data returns a data dict with full structured content.
data.message_id is a newly generated unique non-empty string per send; two sends differ.
data.sources is an array of {name,title,url} from _build_sources_payload; SMS string builder unchanged.
data.sms_body equals _format_sms_message(event,db,config) byte-for-byte (trimmed SMS mirror).
data includes full summary_pl, event_type_pl, affected_countries[], aggressor (str, ''=none), first_seen_at (UTC ISO).
Existing data keys event_id, urgency_score, event_type preserved.
data.kind 'update'/'event'; title equals _format_push(event,is_update)[0].
json.dumps(data,ensure_ascii=False).encode utf-8 <= 3500 bytes; trim order sources->sms_body->summary_pl; scalars never dropped.
Expo message sets top-level _contentAvailable:true; no content-available key.
title and body remain set (push stays visible).
All pre-existing push behavior preserved (routing/gating, record-presence dedup, phone_call additive push, is_update update push).
_build_sources_payload is the single source of data.sources, preserving _build_sources_list ordering.
_build_push_data(event,db,config,is_update)->dict is a returnable seam; _maybe_send_push delegates to it.
Test harness added: pinned deps/devDeps, non-watch 'test':'jest', jest-expo preset config, babel.config.js; typecheck+test pass.
jest.setup.js mocks AsyncStorage via .../jest/async-storage-mock and mocks expo-notifications AND expo-task-manager.
tsconfig configured so tsc --noEmit type-checks test files cleanly (types: jest,node).
StoredMessage defined per Appendix B (aggressor: string, not null); strict type-check passes.
parsePayload normalizes data, null-guards title/body, derives message_id (message_id->event_id->osIdentifier->synth:received:rand), never throws.
parsePayload falls back when structured fields absent (sms_body/summary=body, sources=[], event_type_pl=title|'(alert)', aggressor='').
Adapters extract data from foreground (content.data object) and headless (data.data.dataString string) shapes; headless handled defensively, logs raw shape.
Store persists one JSON array under '@sentinel/messages', insertion-order newest-first; received_at UTC ISO at ingest.
ingest dedups on message_id: existing id is no-op on order/received_at/fields, preserves read; new id prepended.
An update (same event_id, different message_id) is a separate message.
After prepend/dedup, cap retention at 200, dropping from the tail (oldest).
markRead, markAllRead, remove, clear persist; unreadCount returns unread total.
load() returns [] (logs) on missing/corrupted storage; never throws.
Background task defined+registered in index.ts module scope; ingests via headless adapter; swallows errors.
useMessages() exposes messages, unreadCount, operations; re-reads after mutations.
Store treats AsyncStorage as source of truth (no hidden cache surviving reload); tests clear() in beforeEach and seed corrupted via setItem.
setNotificationHandler called in index.ts module scope (shouldShowBanner/List true, shouldSetBadge false); not an alteration to token-minting.
Navigation/browser deps added at pinned versions, append-only to Phase-2 package.json (jest block/scripts/deps survive).
App.tsx: SafeAreaProvider+NavigationContainer(ref,onReady flush)+native-stack List(initial)+Detail; showcase no longer entry.
navigationRef guarded navigate + pending-route queue flushed via flushPendingRoute on onReady.

Tap routing opens Detail by data.message_id: warm+cold; only DEFAULT_ACTION_IDENTIFIER; ingest before navigate; cold/warm dedup on last-handled message_id (in-session, not persisted); clearLastNotificationResponseAsync; no deprecated sync getter.
Foreground received listener ingests; AppState active tray-sweep via getPresentedNotificationsAsync (null-guard) ingests; both resolve message_id identically (one entry); helpers swallow errors.
App icon badge reflects unread via syncBadge(setBadgeCountAsync) on foreground+mutations; checks boolean return, swallows false; shouldSetBadge stays false.
registerForPush permission request includes allowBadge:true (+allowAlert/allowSound); adding options is not altering token-minting.
MessageListScreen renders newest-first tiles (emoji+type, X/10, snippet, relative time), unread-dot, tap->Detail, empty-state, header Settings+Clear-all.
Delete single (confirm->store.remove); Clear-all (confirm->store.clear); mark-all-read SHOULD.

MessageDetailScreen renders spec-owned field order (detail-header/urgency/countries/aggressor/summary/sources/time); omits Agresor row when empty/whitespace; device-local Wykryto; marks read on mount; delete; falls back to sms_body.
Sources render name:title; non-null url tappable via WebBrowser.openBrowserAsync; null url plain text; open failure caught.
datetime.ts device-local: relative(iso,nowMs) with exact floor boundaries (now/Xm/Xh/Xd); absolute(iso); injected now.
Token minting/copy preserved, reachable as Settings; token-minting logic functional; allowBadge options and handler move are not alterations.
docs/how-to/mobile-inbox-verification.md exists with MA-1..MA-7 and notes background capture best-effort/tray-sweep.
capture helpers and badge sync are fault-isolated: thrown/rejected getPresentedNotificationsAsync/parsePayload/ingest/setBadgeCountAsync caught, no crash.

tests.name: test_build_push_data_includes_full_content
tests.assertion: _build_push_data returns dict with all content keys; existing keys equal event; first_seen_at parses ISO UTC

tests.name: test_push_sources_carry_urls
tests.assertion: data.sources length matches; each url equals article source_url; null url when absent

tests.name: test_push_sms_body_equals_sms_message
tests.assertion: is_update False: data.sms_body == _format_sms_message(event,db,config); is_update True: == _format_update_sms(event,db,config)

tests.name: test_push_message_id_unique_per_send
tests.assertion: two _build_push_data calls yield different non-empty message_id

tests.name: test_push_update_kind_and_title
tests.assertion: is_update True -> kind 'update' + title==_format_push(event,True)[0]; else kind 'event'

tests.name: test_push_payload_sets_content_available
tests.assertion: message has _contentAvailable True, no content-available key, non-empty title+body

tests.name: test_push_data_within_byte_budget_and_trims
tests.assertion: len(json.dumps(data,ensure_ascii=False).encode('utf-8'))<=3500 for large event; sources trimmed; pathological summary -> sources=[] and truncated summary_pl; message_id/event_id kept

tests.name: test_push_behavior_preserved
tests.assertion: disabled/empty->no push; both->one push+SMS unchanged; prior push AlertRecord (is_update False)->no re-push; phone_call->additive push; is_update True->push despite existing record

tests.name: test_push_aggressor_is_string
tests.assertion: data.aggressor == event.aggressor (str); empty aggressor -> '' not None

tests.name: test_push_summary_pl_is_full
tests.assertion: for a ~800-char summary + 2 short-URL sources (data well under 3500 bytes, 1.2 does not fire), data.summary_pl is the full summary and longer than the summary inside sms_body

tests.name: test_ingest_adds_and_persists
tests.assertion: after ingest, all() length 1 and fresh load() (re-read AsyncStorage) returns same message

tests.name: test_ingest_dedupes_by_message_id
tests.assertion: same message_id twice -> length 1

tests.name: test_ingest_preserves_read_position_received_at_on_redup
tests.assertion: ingest A,B; markRead(A); re-ingest A -> length 2, A still read, A index+received_at unchanged

tests.name: test_update_is_separate_message
tests.assertion: same event_id different message_id -> length 2

tests.name: test_cap_at_200_keeps_newest
tests.assertion: ingest 205 with strictly increasing received_at -> length 200; newest at index 0; oldest gone

tests.name: test_sorted_newest_first
tests.assertion: all()[0] is newest

tests.name: test_mark_read_all_remove_clear
tests.assertion: markRead/markAllRead set flags+unreadCount; remove drops one; clear empties; survive reload

tests.name: test_load_corrupted_returns_empty
tests.assertion: setItem('@sentinel/messages','not-json') -> load() returns [] no throw

tests.name: test_parse_rich_payload
tests.assertion: full Appendix-A data -> StoredMessage all fields; read false; message_id from data.message_id; aggressor a string

tests.name: test_parse_thin_payload_fallback
tests.assertion: data only event_id + body -> sources []; sms_body/summary=body; event_type_pl=title|'(alert)'; message_id=event_id

tests.name: test_parse_null_title_body_synth_key
tests.assertion: title null, body null, data absent -> message_id matches /^synth:/; no throw

tests.name: test_parse_headless_datastring_shape
tests.assertion: headless {data:{dataString}} yields same as foreground {request:{content:{data}}}; malformed headless -> fallback, no throw

tests.name: test_bootstrap_registers_task_and_handler
tests.assertion: importing bootstrap.ts calls TaskManager.defineTask, Notifications.registerTaskAsync, setNotificationHandler at module load (no React tree mounted)

tests.name: test_background_task_swallows_ingest_error
tests.assertion: task callback with store.ingest throwing does not propagate

tests.name: test_decide_route_navigates_on_new_message
tests.assertion: decideRoute('m1', null) -> {navigate:true, messageId:'m1', handledMessageId:'m1'}

tests.name: test_decide_route_dedupes_same_message
tests.assertion: decideRoute('m1','m1') -> {navigate:false}

tests.name: test_navigation_ref_queues_until_ready
tests.assertion: navigate before isReady does not call navigator; flushPendingRoute (ready) replays once

tests.name: test_foreground_listener_ingests
tests.assertion: addNotificationReceivedListener callback parses and ingests once

tests.name: test_sweep_presented_ingests_null_guarded
tests.assertion: getPresentedNotificationsAsync 2 entries (one null data) -> ingest valid one, no throw; rejected call swallowed

tests.name: test_foreground_then_sweep_single_entry
tests.assertion: same data.message_id via foreground then sweep -> one stored message

tests.name: test_sync_badge_sets_unread_count
tests.assertion: syncBadge(3)->setBadgeCountAsync(3); syncBadge(0)->setBadgeCountAsync(0); false return tolerated

tests.name: test_register_for_push_requests_allowBadge_and_mints
tests.assertion: registerForPushNotificationsAsync calls requestPermissionsAsync with ios.allowBadge true and getExpoPushTokenAsync with configured projectId

tests.name: test_datetime_absolute_local
tests.assertion: with TZ Europe/Warsaw, absolute('2026-06-02T14:31:00Z') equals expected Warsaw-local string

tests.name: test_list_renders_n_tiles
tests.assertion: await render with 3 messages -> getAllByTestId('message-tile') length 3

tests.name: test_list_unread_dot_count
tests.assertion: 2 unread of 3 -> getAllByTestId('unread-dot') length 2

tests.name: test_list_empty_state
tests.assertion: 0 messages -> getByTestId('empty-state') present

tests.name: test_list_clear_all_confirms_and_clears
tests.assertion: Clear-all + confirm -> mocked clear called once

tests.name: test_detail_renders_all_fields
tests.assertion: Detail (2 sources, non-empty aggressor) shows urgency, joined countries, aggressor, summary, each source name/title; field rows detail-header/urgency/countries/aggressor/summary/sources/time appear in that top-to-bottom order

tests.name: test_detail_omits_empty_aggressor
tests.assertion: Detail with aggressor '' renders no Agresor row

tests.name: test_detail_source_opens_in_app_browser
tests.assertion: press source with url -> WebBrowser.openBrowserAsync(url); null-url source not pressable

tests.name: test_detail_source_open_failure_swallowed
tests.assertion: rejected openBrowserAsync is caught, no throw

tests.name: test_detail_marks_read_on_mount
tests.assertion: render Detail -> mocked markRead called with id

tests.name: test_detail_fallback_to_sms_body
tests.assertion: message missing structured fields but with sms_body -> renders sms_body text

tests.name: test_tile_shows_title_urgency_snippet_time
tests.assertion: MessageTile renders event_type_pl, X/10, summary snippet, relative time

3: node -e "const p=require('./mobile/package.json'); if(!(p.jest&&p.jest.preset==='jest-expo'&&p.scripts&&p.scripts.test==='jest'&&p.dependencies&&p.dependencies['@react-native-async-storage/async-storage']&&p.dependencies['expo-task-manager'])) { console.error('Phase-2 package.json keys were clobbered'); process.exit(1); }"
